title: Tough As Nails: A Curios Expansion
description: Ever thought Tough as Nails needed a few baubles?
body:
# **Tough As Nails: A Curios Expansion**
Tough As Nails: A Curios Expansion is a addon for [Tough as Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) by [Adubbz](https://modrinth.com/user/Adubbz) that adds several baubles to the game via the [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) by [TheIllusiveC4](https://modrinth.com/user/TheIllusiveC4) along with a direct progression structure to counteract the temperatures.

## Requirements
![Available for Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ab99e9e374660b90fc09e145467961de3ca075.png)
![Requires Tough as Nails](https://i.imgur.com/H7tvggx.png) ![Requires Curios API](https://i.imgur.com/ToDdyvG.png)

## Description
This mod aims to make it so temperature serves it's purpose in the early game, becomes easier in the mid game - and stops being a nusisance in the late game.

Ever found temperature really fun and interesting for the first few hours of your playthrough? Thought that there should be some kind of progression outside of just Thermal Tuning? Say hello to "Thermal Insulation" a new type of Curios inventory that allows you to craft and equip Thermal Pads that have different effects; there's one to counteract burning to death and one to counteract freezing to death... and if you're up for the challenge a universal one that counteracts burning/freezing to both elements; you're going to have to brew some new Firoze Liquid to make it though ahost a bunch of other rare ingredients.

## Features
### 1. New Insulation Curios Baubles slot
```
You can place three types of Insulation in the new slot. 
Heating, Cooling & Universal; all with their own unique crafting recipes.
```
### 2. New self-regulation redstone circuits 
```
These new circuits are used in order to craft insulation and provide a unique recipe for the insulation items.
```
### 3. Seemless integration and advancement progression
```
Adds additional gameplay and progression to Tough as Nails. 
Aswell as enhancing your curios slots; there is an advancement tree to unlock to complete your playthrough!
```

## Images

![Easily slot in new insulation!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f3eb0473056554ac59a17265f41ec4c43bdefc.png)   >>> Easily equip insulation pads in the new slot!

![The three types of insulation.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75da80be98e2e6b971f74d9e7e0e1fe89941f823.png)
